title: Ultimine Rewind
description: Rewind/undo functionality for FTB Ultimine. Restore mined blocks with Ctrl+Z. Supports partial restoration and creative mode.
body:
# Ultimine Rewind

Add undo/rewind functionality to FTB Ultimine. Made a mistake while vein mining? Press **Ctrl+Z** to restore your blocks!

## Features

- 🔄 **Undo Mining** - Press Ctrl+Z to open the restoration interface
- 📦 **Material System** - Provide blocks to restore what you mined
- ✨ **Creative Mode** - No materials needed in creative mode
- 🔁 **Partial Restore** - Restore as many blocks as your materials allow, continue with Ctrl+Z
- 🌍 **Multiplayer Safe** - Works on servers with anti-dupe protection
- 🎨 **Vanilla Style UI** - Uses native chest interface

## How to Use

1. **Mine blocks** with FTB Ultimine
2. **Press Ctrl+Z** to open the restoration menu
3. **Place materials** into the container (same blocks you mined)
4. **Click "Restore Blocks"** to undo your mining

### Partial Restoration
Not enough materials? No problem!
- The mod will restore as many blocks as possible
- Remaining blocks stay in the record
- Press Ctrl+Z again with more materials to continue

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Forge 47.0+
- **FTB Ultimine** (Required)

## Notes

- Block entities (chests, furnaces) are restored empty to prevent item duplication
- Records expire after 10 minutes
- Only the last mining operation can be undone
- Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer
